results.title: Reset Filters - Search Results Preserve Search Term
results.notes: Search 'printer' (31 results) -> HP brand filter (5) -> Reset filters -> 31 results restored, term preserved in input and URL

results.title: Search - No Results
results.notes: Query 'xyzabc123' returned proper no-results state with 'Sorry...didn't return any results' heading

results.title: Search - Special Characters
results.notes: test & test (132 results), product (new) (6 results), item #123 (no results) - all handled gracefully, no crashes

results.title: Search - Filters on Results
results.notes: Sidebar facets present, Color: Black filter narrowed 4->1, AND logic verified. Price slider was degenerate due to small filtered set

results.title: Organization Search - Find Org
results.notes: No customer-facing organization search UI exposed for current B2B user (slot 1, TechFlow org admin). /company/members redirects to dashboard. Org search likely a privileged Admin SPA feature - out of storefront scope for this user role.

results.title: Organization Search - Filters
results.notes: Same as SRCH-009 - no user-facing org search filters available for slot 1 user role

results.title: Search Results - Show in Stock Checkbox Default and Toggle
results.notes: BUG-005-001: 'Show in stock' is UNCHECKED by default (CSV expects checked). Toggle works (printer 31->28 when toggled on). No chip in chip bar even after toggle.

results.title: Search Results - Purchased Before Checkbox
results.notes: Checkbox exists, unchecked by default (per CSV). Toggle filtering not exercised - slot 1 user (TechFlow org admin) likely has no personal purchase history; checkbox visibility verified only

results.title: Search Results - Sidebar Facet Filter
results.notes: Color: Black narrowed 4->1, URL got facets param, Reset cleared filter and restored count

results.title: Search Results - Reset Filters Preserves Search Term
results.notes: Reset filters retained 'hoodie' in input, URL stayed ?q=hoodie, full set restored

results.title: Search - No Results State UI Validation
results.notes: H1 has bold query, 'Reset search' button present, 0 product cards. Heading text differs from CSV verbatim ('didn't return any results' instead of 'There are no results found'). Sidebar facet panel still rendered on no-results page (CSV expects no sidebar) - minor UX inconsistency

results.title: Search - Reset Search Button Clears Query
results.notes: Reset search -> /catalog, input cleared

results.title: Search - Whitespace-Only Query Handling
results.notes: 3 spaces -> trimmed to empty -> /search showing all 4131 catalog results, no error

results.title: Search - Very Long Query (200+ Characters)
results.notes: 200 'a' chars -> URL length 248, no-results page with truncated heading, no JS/server errors

results.title: Search - XSS Script Injection in Input
results.notes: Payload <script>alert('xss')</script> properly escaped in heading (<script>), no alert dialog, no script execution

results.title: Search - SQL Injection Attempt
results.notes: Payload ' OR '1'='1 returned 184 results gracefully, no DB error or stack trace

results.title: Search - Special Characters Are URL-Encoded Correctly
results.notes: & encoded as %26, # encoded as %23. Parentheses left literal (RFC 3986 allows). Headings show decoded query

results.title: Search Bar - Keyboard-Only Navigation
results.notes: Escape closes dropdown (PASS) but ALSO clears input value - debatable UX. Tab navigation and Arrow key dropdown traversal not fully verified due to time budget. Search input itself is reachable and focuses normally

results.title: Search Bar - ARIA Roles and Labels
results.notes: Search input has type=search (implicit role=searchbox per snapshot), accessible name 'Search'. Search button has aria-label='Search'. Dropdown items lack explicit role=option (a11y gap noted but tolerable). Magnifier and clear buttons have implicit/explicit accessible names

results.title: Search - Autocomplete Response Time Under 2 Seconds
results.notes: Autocomplete worked (Vintage Colorado Hoodie appeared after typing 'hoodie'), all GraphQL calls returned 200 OK. Exact timing unmeasurable via MCP tool overhead - subjective response felt < 2s

results.title: Search - Results Page Load Time Under 3 Seconds
results.notes: Navigation Performance API: domContentLoaded ~13ms (cached), all requests 200, no major CLS observed

results.title: Search Bar - Firefox Compatibility
results.notes: Out of scope for slot 1 (playwright-chrome only). Run via slot 2 (qa-testing-expert/Firefox)

results.title: Search Bar - Edge Compatibility
results.notes: Out of scope for slot 1 (playwright-chrome only). Run via slot 3 (qa-backend-expert/Edge)

results.title: Search Bar - Mobile Viewport 375px
results.notes: Search input hidden behind 'Toggle search bar' button on mobile (good responsive pattern). Mobile dropdown fits 375px viewport. BUG-005-002: backdrop button has aria-label='common.labels.close' (raw i18n key leak)

results.title: Search - Mobile Results Page Layout 375px
results.notes: 375px: no horizontal scroll, h1 visible, 22 product cards in single-column 312px width. Note: 26/46 buttons below 44x44 minimum touch target - a11y concern but consistent with other VC pages

results.title: Search - GA4 search Event Fires on Query Submission
results.notes: dataLayer.push captured: { event: 'search', search_term: 'hoodie', items_count: 0, visible_items: '' }. Note: items_count: 0 is suspicious given 4 results, but event itself fires

results.title: Search - GA4 view_search_results Event on Results Page
results.notes: dataLayer captured view_search_results with search_term: 'hoodie', results_count: 4, results_page: 1, visible_items SKU list correct

results.title: Search to Cart - Full End-to-End Flow
results.notes: Searched 'hoodie' -> located Vintage Colorado Hoodie at $54.00 -> clicked Increase quantity (+) on product card -> cart badge incremented -> /cart shows Vintage Colorado Hoodie at $54.00. Cleanup: item left in cart due to busy cart state (78 items already)

results.title: Facet Count Accuracy - Badge Count Matches Product Count
results.notes: HP brand showed (5), applied filter, h1='5 results', 5 product cards rendered - counts match exactly

results.title: Cross-Layer Search Consistency - Storefront Matches API Data
results.notes: DOM: Vintage Colorado Hoodie / $54.00. GraphQL products query response: name='Vintage Colorado Hoodie', code='BAJ-18974454', price.actual.amount=54. Exact match

results.title: Sort Plus Filter Interaction - Sort Persists After Facet Application
results.notes: Selected 'Price, high to low' (URL: sort=price-descending). Applied Brand: HP. URL retained both: ?q=printer&sort=price-descending&facets=BRAND:HP. Combobox value still 'Price, high to low'

results.title: Price Range Boundary Precision - Exact Boundary Value Filtering
results.notes: Price filter is min/max range slider with coupled min<=max constraint - unable to set both to exactly $54.00 in UI. The data range was also degenerate ($30-$30 for filtered set). Would require admin-side seeding of products at exact price points to test boundary precisely

results.title: Cross-Facet AND Logic - Multiple Facet Groups Combine Correctly
results.notes: Brand=HP -> 5 results. Brand=HP + Type=physical -> 1 result. 1 <= 5 confirms AND logic narrows. URL has both facets in params

results.title: Facet Terms Ordered by Dictionary Item Priority
results.notes: Brand terms displayed alphabetical (3DR, BITCED, FUJIFILM, HP, LOLEDE, MIJIA, PeriPage). No dictionary property with explicit priority configured for 'printer' search context to validate. Fallback alphabetical IS in effect

results.title: Facet Term Order Stable Across Page Reloads
results.notes: Brand order identical pre and post reload: BITCED, FUJIFILM, HP, LOLEDE, MIJIA, PeriPage (3DR off list due to ordering by case)

results.title: Facet Terms Without Priority Default to Consistent Fallback Order
results.notes: Non-prioritized brand terms display alphabetically (deterministic fallback), stable across reloads

bugs_filed.title: Show in stock checkbox not checked by default on search results
i18n translation key exposed as raw aria-label on mobile search backdrop

cross_referenced_bugs: BUG-004-001 (search dropdown not restored after Clear) - not re-encountered in suite 005
BUG-004-002 (no typo tolerance) - not re-encountered in suite 005

BUG_003_001 (pagination gap) - 22 product cards rendered for hoodie search (4 results) and printer search (31 results, all visible). No pagination tested explicitly in suite 005 - infinite scroll mode active per memory

console_health.notes: No JS exceptions during 33 test cases. Warnings related to layout/Vue dev tooling, not functional

network_health.notes: All /graphql POST requests returned 200 OK across all tests
